ValidationRule.description: Opération Team/GHOS ne peut pas être vide pour passer a l'étape "Ready for Gouvernance"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND ( RecordType.Name = "IS Agreement", NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),
ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Ready for governance"), OR((Operations_Team__c=false),(GHOS__c=false), (Legal_Team__c = false), (Compliance_Team__c = false) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To proceed to "Ready for Gouvernance" stage, the following boxes must be checked : Operations Team, GHOS, Legal Team and Copliance Team
